ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "macro_taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the project */,
  "reduction_factor" REAL /* Factor indicating the extent of reduction achieved through mitigation strategies */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structural_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structural component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the component is associated with */,
  "structural_value" INTEGER /* Value representing the impact of the structural component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the structural component */,
  "component_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the structural component */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., environmental, social, economic) */,
  "reduction_strategy" TEXT /* Specific reduction strategy applied to the component */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was implemented */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonstructural_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-structural component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the component is associated with */,
  "nonstructural_value" INTEGER /* Value representing the impact of the non-structural component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the non-structural component */,
  "component_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the non-structural component */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., environmental, social, economic) */,
  "reduction_strategy" TEXT /* Specific reduction strategy applied to the component */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was implemented */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonstructural_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the content relates to */,
  "contents_value" INTEGER /* Value representing various metrics or contents of the project */,
  "content_name" TEXT /* Name of the content or metric */,
  "content_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the content or metric */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., report, data, visualization) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
